title: Personalization Studio
highlights: ✨ Animated avatar rings: Glow, Pulse, Fire, Neon, Aura, Spin, Rainbow, Sparks (Particles)
🎵 Status emoji beside your name in chat (15 options)
🏠 Per-room custom backgrounds (9 gradient presets, saved per room)
🎆 Particle canvas effect orbiting your header avatar when Sparks ring is active
🎨 Style tab expanded with all new personalization sections
changes: [NEW] CSS @keyframes av-ring-rotate, av-pulse-ring, av-fire-ring, av-aura-ring
[NEW] .av-ring-wrap wrapper div wraps every message avatar — enables ::before spinning rings
[NEW] 9 avatar ring styles: none, glow, pulse, fire, neon, aura, spin, rainbow, particles
[NEW] STYLE_RING_PRESETS constant with CSS class, color, gradient metadata
[NEW] _avatarRingCache + _maybeLoadAvatarRing(userId) — fetches profile.avatarRing async
[NEW] _applyAvatarRingToAll(userId, ringId) — applies ring to all DOM avatars for that user
[NEW] _handleOwnRingParticles(ringId) — spawns requestAnimationFrame canvas on header avatar
[NEW] STYLE_STATUS_EMOJIS (15 options) + _statusEmojiCache + _maybeLoadStatusEmoji(userId)
[NEW] Status emoji .msg-status-emoji span rendered after sender name in messages
[NEW] STYLE_ROOM_BG_PRESETS (9 presets) — night, forest, ocean, rose, ember, cyber, soft, ash
[NEW] _applyRoomBg(roomName) — reads cp2p_room_bg_{room} from localStorage
[NEW] STYLE_CLOSET_TINTS (8 tints) + _applyClosetTint(dmRoom)
[NEW] Style tab: Avatar Ring section (animated ring demo picker)
[NEW] Style tab: Status Emoji section (emoji grid)
[NEW] Style tab: Per-Room Background section (only when in a group room)
[NEW] Style tab: Closet Tint section (only when in a DM room)
[WIRE] _doJoinRoom calls _applyRoomBg or _applyClosetTint on join
[WIRE] Login flow calls _maybeLoadAvatarRing(session.userId)
[WIRE] Message renderer wraps avatarEl in av-ring-wrap + loads ring async
[WIRE] Message renderer checks _statusEmojiCache and appends emoji span
